item.description: Biography I am a Ph.D. candidate in the Department of Industrial Engineering and Decision Analytics, the Hong Kong University of Science & Technology. My expected graduation is in June, 2018. My works mainly focus on stochastic optimization and stochastic modelling for big data. Please refer to my CV for details.

item.title: Papers
item.description: L. Ding, X.W. Zhang, Scalable Stochastic Kriging with Markovian Covariances, submitted to Operations Research L. Ding, X.W. Zhang, Knowledge Gradient for Robust Selection of the Best, under revision L. Ding, X.W. ZHang, Enhancing Gaussian Markov Random Field Model with Weak Derivative Observations, working paper, slide available

item.title: Conference Papers
item.description: L. X.W. ZHang, L. Ding, Sequential Sampling for Bayesian Robust Ranking & Selection, in the Proceedings of the 2016 Winter Simulation Conference (WSC), P758-769

item.title: Teaching Experience
item.description: T.A., IEDA 4130 - System Simulation T.A., IEDA3010 - Operations Research I Guest Lecturer, MATH6450B - Statistical Learning

item.title: Honours & Awards
item.description: HKPSF, UGC, 2015 The Prince of Wales Prize in Mathematics, Trinity College, UofT, 2015 Provost’s Scholar, Trinity College, UofT, 2015 Dean’s List, School of Arts & Science, UofT, 2011, 2012, 2014, 2015
